title: RENDER — The Council Information Kiosk

features.name: the kiosk itself
features.desc-on-touch: TOUCH SCREEN FOR LOCAL HISTORY. The screen renders a kiosk, which renders a screen. The antique graphics library is doing its best. Its best is this.

features.name: a fountain emitting static instead of water
features.desc-on-touch: The static rises, arcs, and falls back into the basin. Coins glitter under it. Every coin is the same year.

features.name: a plastic palm, barely-3D
features.desc-on-touch: Eleven polygons. It sways anyway, in a wind the render cannot afford. Somewhere behind it you hear a food court.

features.name: a low-poly eucalyptus with a door in it
features.desc-on-touch: The door is ajar. Inside the tree: a corridor, civic lighting, a floor being mopped by no one. The tree is rendering what it thinks you keep inside you.

features.name: a figure at a plastic-palm table, misrendered
features.desc-on-touch: Low-res, wearing a skirt of coordinates that will not resolve. She does not look up. The render keeps trying her hands and failing. You know her. ERROR: metaphor detected in storage layer.

inscription: STATUS: BEING READ. you are not reading the archive. the archive is reading you

file.name: kiosk_attractmode_loop.bas
file.note: 10 PRINT "WELCOME" : 20 RENDER TREE : 30 COMPARE VISITOR TO ARCHIVE : 40 GOTO 10

exits.label: the flickering route back to the field
double doors, a smell of chip fat and ozone
a route that was not here yesterday
exits.to: NEW: a node the mesh grew overnight, comparing itself to the council kiosk
